ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of products ordered */,
  "price_each" REAL /* Price of each product */,
  "order_line_number" INTEGER /* Order line number */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Pending) */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the territories table */,
  "deal_size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the deals table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the payment methods table */,
  "order_total" REAL /* The total amount of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* The tax amount of the order */,
  "shipping_amount" REAL /* The shipping amount of the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* The discount amount of the order */,
  "order_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_deal_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_size_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line (e.g., Motorcycles) */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* The category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* The subcategory of the product */,
  "unit_measure" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the product */,
  "length" REAL /* The length of the product */,
  "width" REAL /* The width of the product */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* The type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* The segment of the customer (e.g., premium, regular) */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* The credit limit of the customer */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* The current account balance of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the customer's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_contacts" (
  "contact_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer contact */,
  "contact_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer contact */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The email of the customer contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the customer contact */,
  "contact_job_title" TEXT /* The job title of the customer contact */,
  "contact_department" TEXT /* The department of the customer contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_last_name", "contact_first_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_contacts_customer_name FOREIGN KEY ("customer_name") REFERENCES customers ("customer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_number" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Pending) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "status_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_number", "status_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "order_number" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the payment */,
  "payment_receipt_number" TEXT /* The receipt number of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_number", "payment_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory (e.g., EMEA, Americas) */,
  "territory_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deals" (
  "deal_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deal size */,
  "deal_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the deal size (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  "deal_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the deal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deal_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_deals" (
  "order_number" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "deal_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deal size */,
  "deal_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the deal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_deals_deal_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_size_id") REFERENCES deals ("deal_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North, South) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_regions" (
  "order_number" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "region_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
